harvested_nodes.name: Revoke member access tokens
harvested_nodes.text: Revoke member access tokens immediately on org delete (don't wait for 30-day grace).

harvested_nodes.name: Owner-orphan check before delete
harvested_nodes.text: Org delete requires solo-owner OR explicit ownership transfer.

harvested_nodes.name: Confirmation link timeout 24h
harvested_nodes.text: Email confirmation links expire in 24h — agent default this morning, reviewer accepted, now a team rule.
